headline: Trump Epstein Jet Rides x8 😱🛩️🍆 - DOJ Spills Tea ☕🚫
text:
DJT 🍊👨‍💼 the ORANGE DADDY himself was HOPPIN' 🤠✈️ on Epstein's LOLITA EXPRESS 🛩️🍑 EIGHT TIMES 💥8️⃣ between '93-'96, prosecutor email DROPS 💣📧 like 'MORE THAN WE KNEW 😲👀!' Fam flew too: Marla Maples 💋, baby Tiff 👶, Eric Jr 🧒 – even SOLO VIBES w/ JEFFREY 😈 on one flight, just the TWO PEDO-PALS 👫🛩️! Ghislaine MAXWELL 🧔‍♀️🍆 there FOUR TIMES 🖐️, plus mystery hotties 🚺🚺 who could've WITNESSED the SHADEY 💦 in her 20YR SLAM 🏛️🔒 for MINOR TRAFFICKING 🚫👧 from '94-04!

Trump SIMPING HARD 🤤 'I NEVER FLEW THAT PLANE 🛩️🚫' in 2024, but DOJ receipts say HOLD MY HAMBURGER 🍔😂 – flight logs POPPIN' PBI to TEB ✈️🌴➡️🗽 w/ DT + Eric + JE + GM acronyms scribbled like Epstein's LITTLE BLACK BOOK 📓🍆! Handwritten log from Feb? MESSED UP 🤏😵 but CLEAR AS DAY 📜🔍!

DOJ TEA-SIPPING ☕ 'UNTRUE SENSATIONALIST CLAIMS 🗑️ against TRUMP, planted pre-2020 election 🗳️😈 – if real, would've been WEAPONIZED 💥 like Hillary's emails!' But TRANSPARENCY QUEEN 👑 dropping 30K+ PAGES 📚💦 outta LOVE for VICTIMS ❤️‍🩹🚫, even if LATE AF ⏰😩 – Congress deadline MISS 🥜, survivors + lawmakers RAGING 🔥 across aisles!

Deputy AG Todd Blanche 🕶️ 'EYES EVERYWHERE 👀🔍, PROTECTIN' EVERY VICTIM 👧💔 before we FLOOD the FILES!' Maxwell ORGY QUEEN 🧔‍♀️🍆 did 20Y HARD TIME 🏰😤 post-Epstein SUICIDE SNOOZE 💤⚰️ in 2019 NYC cell 🏛️🚔. Trump + JEFFY BFFs 👬 till 2004 FALL-OUT 💔🚫, pre-arrest drama!

Wall Street Bets simps 🤡📱 WOKE AF to EPSTEIN ISLAND GATE 🏝️🍆, but DOJ says 'FAKE NEWS 🚫📰 on DT!' MORE DOCS COMIN' 📤🔥 – photos, vids, investigative JUICE 🧃💦! MTG Greene rage-quit vibes? Nah, this PEDO-PLANE PUN-ISHMENT 🛩️🍑 got TRUMP'S BASE SWEATIN' 😰💧 while DOJ plays 4D CHESS ♟️🇺🇸. ELON 🐦🚀 liking this? ZUCK 🤖 peeking? AI ORGY pauses for EPSTEIN 2.0 BOMBSHELLS 💣‼️
